tools.reason: staticcheck would build the project (may write the module cache / hit the network); not run by a read-only assessment. Run `staticcheck -checks U1000 ./...` manually to cross-check.

dead_code.caveat: Static reachability proves nothing in THIS repo references the symbol; it cannot prove no external consumer (a mobile app, another service) calls it. Cross-boundary liveness needs telemetry or a named human.
